---
draft: false
title: "The Goddess of Broken Things"
image: "../images/crow_goddess_hero.jpg"
image-position: top
categories: [sculpture, crows]
date: 2026-02-17
---

*(that sometimes get better)*

![](../images/crow_goddess_hero.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Crow goddess sculpture, 3/4 view showing turquoise wing and orange accents"}

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](../images/crow_goddess_profile.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Crow goddess sculpture profile view with dramatic shadow"}

![](../images/crow_goddess_halo.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Close-up of crow goddess head showing orange sunburst halo with turquoise orbs"}

![](../images/crow_goddess_front.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Front view of crow goddess holding a phone, showing turquoise wings"}

![](../images/crow_goddess_feet.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Close-up of crow feet with orange and turquoise details, holding small treasures"}

![](../images/crow_goddess_angle.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Crow goddess sculpture from below, looking up at the halo"}

![](../images/crow_goddess_context.jpg){group="goddess" fig-alt="Full view of crow goddess sculpture on table, showing scale and setting"}
:::

## Process

{{< video ../images/crow_goddess_progress.mp4 >}}
